title: Starting the Kirby-Clone Project
content: Today I set up the basic XP.css structure. Honestly, the nostalgia is hitting hard. I want to make this look as authentic as possible! (｡♥‿♥｡)

title: Why Markdown is Essential for Developers
content:
## Introduction
Markdown allows us to write structured content without leaving the editor. 

### Benefits
- It's **fast**
- It's **portable**
- It looks great on GitHub!

I'm using `marked.js` to render this post right now. Amazing!

title: Learning about CSS Filters
content: Found out how to make 'glassmorphism' using `backdrop-filter`. Maybe I can add some modern touches to this retro theme?

title: Exploring the World of Laravel
content:
Laravel makes backend development so much smoother. The **Eloquent ORM** is a game changer for database interactions.

> "The PHP Framework for Web Artisans"

Can't wait to build more with it.
